testcase.classname: Enrollment status verification from ESS registry
testcase.name: Successfully check enrollment status for active member
testcase.system-out: Given SP system checks enrollment for person "ABC451123"..................passed When A POST request to check enrollment is sent...........................passed Then The check enrollment response should be received.....................passed And The check enrollment response status should be 200....................passed And The check enrollment response should have "Content-Type": "applicat...passed And The check enrollment response should be returned within 15000ms.......passed And The enrolled_status should be "Active"................................passed

testcase.name: Successfully receive notification
testcase.system-out: Given ESS receives a valid notification event.............................passed When A POST request to notify is sent.....................................passed Then The notify response should be received...............................passed And The notify response status should be 200..............................passed And The notify response should have "Content-Type": "application/json" ...passed And The notify response should be returned within 15000ms.................passed And The notify response ack_status should be "ACK"........................passed

testcase.classname: Async search initiation from ESS registry
testcase.name: Successfully initiate async search request
testcase.system-out: Given SP system wants to async search for eligible members in ESS.........passed When A POST request to async search is sent...............................passed Then The response from the async search should be received................passed And The async search response should have status 200......................passed And The async search response should have "Content-Type": "application/...passed And The async search response should be returned within 15000ms...........passed And The ack_status should be "ACK"........................................passed

testcase.name: Successfully subscribe to events
testcase.failure: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'ack_status') at World.<anonymous> (file:///app/features/support/subscribe.js:55:39)
testcase.system-out: Given SP system subscribes to ESS events..................................passed When A POST request to subscribe is sent..................................passed Then The subscribe response should be received............................passed And The subscribe response status should be 200...........................passed And The subscribe response should have "Content-Type": "application/jso...passed And The subscribe response should be returned within 15000ms..............passed And The subscribe response ack_status should be "ACK".....................failed

testcase.name: Successfully perform synchronous search
testcase.system-out: Given SP system requests member data from ESS.............................passed When A POST request to sync search is sent................................passed Then The response should be received......................................passed And The sync search response status should be 200.........................passed And The sync search response should have "Content-Type": "application/j...passed And The sync search response should be returned within 15000ms............passed And The sync search response should match the expected JSON schema........passed
